common.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

header.becomeAStarSubtitle: It's easy to start earning and grow your business.

home.title: Your home, clean and fixed.
home.subtitle: Book a free visit. Workers come to you, assess the job, and send a quote.
home.ctaText: Are you a professional? Join STAR and get clients in your area.
home.comingSoonDesc: Try choosing a different service type, or change the location to find workers in other areas.
home.browseProfiles: Browse {{count}} warm, professional profiles for your next booking in {{city}}.

search.title: {{category}} in {{location}}
search.noWorkersDesc: We don't have workers matching your search yet. Try a different category or location.

workerDetail.customiseNote: You can message {{name}} to customise or make changes.
workerDetail.noPackages: This worker hasn't added service packages yet. Message them to discuss your job.
workerDetail.whereIWorkDesc: I travel to clients in the area shown on the map. Message me to discuss locations outside this area.
workerDetail.clientRequirementsDesc: Clients must be aged 18 or over to book.
workerDetail.cancellationPolicyDesc: Cancel at any time. No penalty for clients.
workerDetail.trustTitle: Workers on STAR are vetted for quality
workerDetail.trustDesc: Every worker on STAR is reviewed for professionalism, reliability, and quality of work before being listed on the platform. Message us to learn more.

profilePhoto.title: Let's finish up your profile
profilePhoto.hint: Upload a photo that clearly shows your face and shoulders. This is how clients will recognise you.
profilePhoto.dragHint: Drag to reposition · scroll to zoom
profilePhoto.cardHint: This is the first thing clients see when browsing workers. Upload a quality photo related to your work, or keep the default image for now.

workerProfileCleaner.intro: Choose the cleaning services you offer. You can select more than one.
workerProfileCleaner.otherPlaceholder: Add any other cleaning skills here

workerSkill.heading: Which of these best describes your skill?

categorySignup.profilePictureHint: Upload a photo that clearly shows your face and shoulders only. This is how clients will recognise you.
categorySignup.cardPictureHint: Upload a high quality photo related to your work. This is the first thing clients see on your card. You can leave the default image if you don't have one yet.
categorySignup.welcomeText: Your profile is under review. We will contact you shortly.
categorySignup.errPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

signupModal.phoneHint: We'll call or text you to confirm your number.
signupModal.passwordHint: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signupModal.errPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signupModal.checkEmailDesc: We've sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click the link to verify your account.

finishProfile.title: Finish signing up
finishProfile.legalNameHint: Make sure this matches your full legal name.
finishProfile.dobHint: You must be at least 18 to sign up.
finishProfile.errUnder18: You must be at least 18 years old to sign up.
finishProfile.emailHint: We'll send you booking confirmations and updates.
finishProfile.termsPre: By selecting Agree and continue, I agree to STAR's

workerAbout.title: Tell us a bit more about you
workerAbout.subtitle: Help clients understand who you are before they book.
workerAbout.yearsLabel: How many years have you been in {{category}}?
workerAbout.notableLabel: Add something notable about your skill
workerAbout.trainingLabel: Add a degree, training or experience
workerAbout.honoursLabel: Add any honours or media features

serviceArea.title: Where will you work?
serviceArea.subtitle: Enter your starting location and set your maximum drive time.

portfolio.title: Show off your best work
portfolio.subtitle: Upload up to 10 photos of your work. Clients love seeing real examples before they book.

packages.title: Create your packages
packages.subtitle: Add at least one service package that clients can book. You can add up to five.
packages.descPlaceholder: Describe what the client gets with this package…
